events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: missing hanger nails (empty holes) in connectors/fasteners, rough-complete stage. This is non-compliant because Simpson hangers require all specified fastener holes filled with correct nails. Missing nails means the connector won't achieve its rated load. Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 85. Confidence high.
